notes: P2: angles.py computes elbow_flexion/etc with frame-by-frame Python loops — acceptable for current scale but could be vectorized with numpy broadcasting for large batches
P3: trunk_rotation sign convention (+/-) is empirically defined and undocumented beyond the inline comment
P3: kinetics.py search_end_frame defaults to T which means wrist speed peak could be found after release — callers should pass release+1
